scripts.check:plans: for f in docs/plans/P-000-runtime-foundation.md $(find docs/plans/mvp1 docs/plans/mvp2 docs/plans/mvp3 docs/plans/mvp4 -type f -name '*.md' ! -name 'index.md'); do ./scripts/validate-plan.sh "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.check:inventories: for f in $(find docs/plans/mvp1 -type f -name 'M1-*.md'); do ./scripts/validate-resource-inventory.sh "$f" || exit 1; done
